ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "regional_indicator" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "ladder_score" REAL /* Overall happiness score (ladder score) */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the ladder score */,
  "upper_whisker" REAL /* Upper whisker value for the confidence interval */,
  "lower_whisker" REAL /* Lower whisker value for the confidence interval */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with these economic indicators */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "freedom_to_choose" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices score */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score reflecting charitable behavior */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the country */,
  "income_inequality" REAL /* Gini coefficient or another measure of income inequality */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_indicators" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social indicator entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with these social indicators */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support score indicating community support levels */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy in years */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Score reflecting perceptions of corruption in the country */,
  "education_index" REAL /* Measure of the country's education level */,
  "healthcare_quality" REAL /* Measure of the quality of healthcare in the country */,
  "gender_equality_index" REAL /* Measure of gender equality in the country */,
  "environmental_quality" REAL /* Measure of environmental quality */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dystopia_scores" (
  "dystopia_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dystopia score entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with this score */,
  "dystopia_score" REAL /* Ladder score in a hypothetical dystopia */,
  "residual" REAL /* Residual value representing unexplained variance */,
  "dystopia_gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita in a hypothetical dystopia */,
  "dystopia_social_support" REAL /* Social support score in a hypothetical dystopia */,
  "dystopia_healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy in a hypothetical dystopia */,
  "dystopia_freedom_to_choose" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices score in a hypothetical dystopia */,
  "dystopia_generosity" REAL /* Generosity score in a hypothetical dystopia */,
  "dystopia_perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption score in a hypothetical dystopia */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dystopia_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dystopia_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "explanations" (
  "explanation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each explanation entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with these explanations */,
  "explained_by_gdp" REAL /* Contribution of Log GDP per capita to the ladder score */,
  "explained_by_social" REAL /* Contribution of social support to the ladder score */,
  "explained_by_health" REAL /* Contribution of healthy life expectancy to the ladder score */,
  "explained_by_freedom" REAL /* Contribution of freedom to make life choices to the ladder score */,
  "explained_by_generosity" REAL /* Contribution of generosity to the ladder score */,
  "explained_by_corruption" REAL /* Contribution of perceptions of corruption to the ladder score */,
  "explained_by_unemployment" REAL /* Contribution of the unemployment rate to the ladder score */,
  "explained_by_inflation" REAL /* Contribution of the inflation rate to the ladder score */,
  "explained_by_poverty" REAL /* Contribution of the poverty rate to the ladder score */,
  "explained_by_income_inequality" REAL /* Contribution of income inequality to the ladder score */,
  "explained_by_education" REAL /* Contribution of the education index to the ladder score */,
  "explained_by_healthcare" REAL /* Contribution of healthcare quality to the ladder score */,
  "explained_by_gender_equality" REAL /* Contribution of gender equality to the ladder score */,
  "explained_by_environmental_quality" REAL /* Contribution of environmental quality to the ladder score */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("explanation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_explanations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
